title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 493.020 - Payment of costs by county, when
text:
493.020.  Payment of costs by county, when. — When any such advertisement shall be made by a public officer, thereunto authorized by law, the reasonable expense thereof shall be allowed and paid out of the county treasury, as other demands and charges of a like nature.
(RSMo 1939 § 14965) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13772; 1919 § 10400; 1909 § 586
